ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player in virtual currency */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Contract expiry date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Team that is playing at home */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Team that is playing away */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the fixture within the season */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Scheduled kickoff time for the fixture */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., '3-1') */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets achieved by the player */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded while the player was on the field */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals scored by the player */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved by the player */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player */,
  "bonus_points" INTEGER /* Bonus points awarded to the player */,
  "bps" INTEGER /* Bonus Point System (BPS) score for the player */,
  "influence" INTEGER /* Influence score for the player */,
  "creativity" INTEGER /* Creativity score for the player */,
  "threat" INTEGER /* Threat score for the player */,
  "ict_index" INTEGER /* ICT Index score for the player */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value score for the player */,
  "transfers_balance" INTEGER /* Net transfers balance for the player */,
  "selected_by" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was selected by users */,
  "transfers_in" INTEGER /* Number of transfers in for the player */,
  "transfers_out" INTEGER /* Number of transfers out for the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" INTEGER /* Pass accuracy percentage for the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "crosses" INTEGER /* Number of crosses made by the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles completed by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_performance_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "league_position" INTEGER /* Current league position of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "form" TEXT /* Recent form of the team (e.g., 'WWLDD') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the user's fantasy football team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fixture for which the player was selected */,
  "is_captain" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player was selected as captain */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the player for the user's team */,
  "position_in_team" TEXT /* Position in the user's fantasy team where the player was placed */,
  "captain_points_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for points earned if the player was selected as captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selections_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_selections_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id")
)
